race.description: Swq Training Pty Ltd Maiden Hcp
race.comment: SIKKA (7) was well in the betting at Gatton on debut but just ran into one better on that occasion. Will have taken some benefit from that race day experience and where there's smoke there's fire. Looks one up to bigger and better than this and can land this prize on the way through to those better contests. ZOUSAIN GIRL (17) resumes here but the form she showed when last in work was good enough for a race like this. Can run a big race while fresh. MR DEMOCRAT (3) next in line despite the sticky draw. Race drops away and he should be able to get involved.
